backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jeevan HealthCare backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Booking, Service, etc.) and exposing shared functions for user management, bookings, services, Stripe payments, and role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the phone number in the Header.tsx top bar strong element should be updated to '+91 9700104108', with high confidence and linked to test REQ-18.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, components, hooks, and styles for the Jeevan HealthCare React application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Jeevan HealthCare frontend, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration that defines all application routes (public, admin, phlebotomist, doctor) and wraps the app with QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster providers.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Admin section layout with a sidebar navigation menu that guards access to admin/lab-executive routes, redirecting unauthenticated or unauthorized users to the home page.
frontend/src/components/doctor/DoctorLay: Provides the authenticated layout shell for the doctor portal, including a sidebar with navigation menu items, and guards access by verifying the user has the doctor role before rendering child routes.
frontend/src/components/DoctorCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying a doctor's avatar, rating, qualifications, consultation modes, and a Book Now button, used in doctor listing pages.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, service links, and contact details including phone, email, address, and social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with a top emergency bar, logo, desktop/mobile navigation, cart badge, and user authentication controls including role-based dashboard routing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, Footer, and a ProfileSetupModal that appears when an authenticated user has no profile.
frontend/src/components/phlebotomist/Phl: Provides the authenticated layout shell for the phlebotomist portal with a sidebar navigation, redirecting unauthenticated or unauthorized users to the home page.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects name, email, and phone from a newly authenticated user and saves their profile as a patient role via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SpecialtyAccordi: Accordion UI listing medical specialty categories with their specialists; clicking a specialist triggers a navigation or callback handler.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store with persistence for managing a shopping cart of lab tests and packages, exposing add, remove, update, and price calculation methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and login status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data, including services, user profiles, role checks, bookings, doctor data, and health packages.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind CSS base layers, Jeevan brand color CSS variables in OKLCH for both light and dark modes, and utility classes for brand colors.
frontend/src/lib/mockDoctors.ts: Defines the MockDoctor TypeScript interface and exports a MOCK_DOCTORS array with sample data for multiple doctors including specialties, fees, availability, and bios. Used as shared mock data across doctor-related pages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider providers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying Jeevan HealthCare's mission, vision, company story, and core values using card-based layout components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCRMPage.ts: Admin CRM page for managing sales leads with status tracking, filtering, and a dialog for adding or editing lead details.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCustomersP: Admin page for managing customers with search, add/edit/delete operations via backend queries, and a details dialog showing associated patients.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Displays an admin dashboard with six metric cards (total orders, active orders, completed orders, total users, phlebotomists, pending reports) fetched via the useDashboardStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Lists all customer bookings fetched via useAllBookings, displaying each order's address, description, preferred date, budget, and urgency status in cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPatientsPa: Full CRUD admin page for managing patients, supporting search, add/edit/delete via mutation hooks, and a details dialog that shows patient vitals.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Displays a static list of mock test reports with verified/pending status badges and buttons to view or verify each report.
Shows all diagnostic services/packages fetched via useAllServices in a grid of cards, displaying name, active status, category, and description.
Lists all system users fetched via useListAllUsers in cards, showing each user's name, email, role (with icon), and active status.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminVitalsPage: Admin page for managing patient vitals with search and status filtering, supporting add/update/delete operations via mutation hooks and displaying status indicators.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Multi-step booking form page that collects patient details, address, time slot, and payment method, then submits the booking and clears the cart on success.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that lists added tests/packages with prices, allows item removal, shows savings, and navigates to the booking flow on checkout.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Static Contact page displaying Jeevan HealthCare's phone, WhatsApp, email, and social media contact details with clickable links.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAnalytic: Displays doctor performance analytics including completed consultations, average rating, total patients, and success rate using stats fetched via useDoctorDashboardStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAppointm: Manages doctor appointments with day/week/month view toggles and allows accepting, cancelling, or completing appointments via the useUpdateDoctorAppointment mutation.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorConsulta: Provides a teleconsultation interface with video/audio/chat controls and a tabbed SOAP notes form for documenting patient consultations and prescriptions.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorDashboar: Doctor dashboard home page showing a personalized welcome and quick stats (today's appointments, pending prescriptions, earnings, rating) fetched from useDoctorDashboardStats.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorEarnings: Displays doctor earnings summary (total, pending payments, current month) from the useDoctorEarnings hook, with a tabbed detail view and an export statement button.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorHelpPage: Renders the doctor Help & Support page with quick-link cards for training, compliance, and support tickets, an FAQ accordion, and a contact/support ticket submission form.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorPatients: Displays a searchable list of the doctor's patients fetched via the useDoctorPatients hook, showing each patient's details, blood group, relationship, and action buttons with loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorProfileP: Provides a tabbed profile settings page for doctors covering personal information, qualifications/certifications, availability scheduling, and notification/security settings.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorConsultationPag: Main doctor consultation landing page with a search bar, specialty accordion, consultation mode cards, and a sortable/filterable list of doctors from mock data. Supports sorting by rating, fee, experience, and today's availability.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorListingPage.tsx: Specialty-specific doctor listing page that filters mock doctors by URL param specialty and supports search and sort options. Falls back to showing all doctors if no specialty match is found.
frontend/src/pages/HealthPage.tsx: Health tools page featuring a symptom checker that analyzes selected symptoms to suggest conditions and severity, along with a vitals tracking section. Uses tabbed UI with progress indicators and badge-based severity display.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Application home page displaying quick service shortcuts, a 'Why Choose Us' section, and dynamically loaded health packages fetched via a React Query hook. Includes navigation to doctor consultation and service detail pages.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Orders management page showing mock lab test orders with status badges, filterable by all/active/completed tabs. Allows navigation to individual order tracking pages.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Order tracking page that displays a hardcoded timeline of lab test order statuses for a given order ID from URL params. Uses check/circle icons to visually indicate completed vs. pending steps.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: Lists the phlebotomist's assigned sample collections for the day, showing patient name, address, scheduled time, test badges, status, and a Google Maps navigation button.
Shows a phlebotomist dashboard with four metric cards (total, completed, in-progress, and pending collections) derived from the useSampleCollections hook.
frontend/src/pages/PublicDoctorProfilePa: Displays a public-facing doctor profile page with details like ratings, consultation modes, availability, fees, and qualifications, fetched via mock data using the doctorId URL param.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Renders a list of verified lab test reports from mock data, allowing users to view report details and download PDFs.
frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx: Displays a detailed service information page (e.g., doctor consultation, medicine delivery, lab tests) based on a URL param, showing included services, target audience, and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/TestsPage.tsx: Provides a diagnostic test catalog with search, category filtering, cart functionality, and prescription upload, supporting both individual tests and health packages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, shadows, fonts, and accordion keyframes, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 19) for the Jeevan HealthCare app, documenting the full feature set, architectural decisions, known issues, and a list of completed feature IDs across the React Native / Node.js / MongoDB stack.
